# Sabkha Al-Fasl

**Summary**: A man-made evaporation lagoon in Jubail Industrial City.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] studied as the primary site for trace metal distribution analysis.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] near Jubail Industrial City

## Formations Present

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] not stated

## Key Findings From This Location

- The area covers 1300ha and serves as a critical habitat for migratory birds. ([[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015, p. 20]])
